case_title: CEP INTL, INC. VS SEQUOIA NATIONAL BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY CEP INTL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA NATIONAL BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA NATIONAL BANK
POS FILED ON SUBPOENA TO SEQUOIA NATIONAL BANK.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CEP INTL, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEQUOIA NATIONAL BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THIS CASE WAS PREVIOUSLY ADJUDICATED BY PRO TEMP JUDGE ARNOLD EVJE. SEE JUDGMENT ON CASE # 717622 720429, & 722192. MATTER HAS BEEN ADJUDICATED AND
PLAINTIFF IS BANNED FROM FILING ANY FURTHER CLAIMS RELATED TO THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THIS CASES. SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY 10/26/92.
